fields.name: pitch ranges*#pitch ranges allow multiple samples to represent the same sound at different pitches
don't play distance:world units#don't play below this distance
attack distance:world units#start playing at full volume at this distance
minimum distance:world units#the distance below which this sound no longer gets louder
maximum distance:world units#the distance beyond which this sound is no longer audible
skip fraction#fraction of requests to play this sound that will be ignored (0 means always play.)
randomization
fields.definition:
these settings control random variation of volume and pitch.
 the second parameter gets clipped to the first.

fields.name: gain base:dB#sound's random gain will start here
gain variance:dB#sound's gain will be randomly modulated within this range
random pitch bounds:cents#the sound's pitch will be modulated randomly within this range.
directional sounds
fields.definition: these settings allow sounds to be directional, fading as they turn away from the listener

fields.name: inner cone angle:degrees#within the cone defined by this angle and the sound's direction, the sound plays with a gain of 1.0.
outer cone angle:degrees#outside the cone defined by this angle and the sound's direction, the sound plays with a gain of OUTER CONE GAIN. (0 means the sound does not attenuate with direction.)
outer cone gain:dB#the gain to use when the sound is directed away from the listener
SCRIPTED LOCATION OVERRIDE
fields.definition:
NOTE: this will only apply when the sound is started via script
azimuth:
    0 => front
    90 => left
    180 => back
    270 => right

fields.name: scale modifiers
fields.definition: as the sound's input scale changes from zero to one, these modifiers move between the two values specified here. the sound will play using the current scale modifier multiplied by the values specified above. (0 values are ignored.)

fields.name: suppression time:seconds#time from when first permutation plays to when another sound from an equal or lower promotion can play
name*#the name of the imported pitch range directory
pitch control
fields.definition: these settings control what pitches this set of samples represents. if there is only one pitch range, all three values are ignored.

fields.name: natural pitch:cents#the apparent pitch when these samples are played at their recorded pitch.
bend bounds:cents#the range of pitches that will be represented using this sample.
full volume bounds!:cents#the range of pitches that map to full gain.
playback bend bounds:cents#the actual pitch will be clamped to this
permutations*#permutations represent equivalent variations of this sound.
name*^#name of the file from which this sample was imported
skip fraction#fraction of requests to play this permutation that are ignored (a different permutation is selected.)
parameter description
fields.definition:
DLS2 filtering:
    resonance gain range: [0, 22.5] dB

parametric EQ:
    gain range: [-64, 14] dB

for mono sounds:
    the left filter controls the DLS 2 parameters
    the right filter controls the Parametric EQ parameters

for stereo sounds:
    both left and right channels must have the same filter
    i.e., filter type both is invalid

options: always spatialize#always play as 3d sound, even in first person
never obstruct#disable occlusion/obstruction for this sound
don't use sound class speaker flag
